open_items.description: Before the live autonomy pilot proceeds to any autonomous action, the boundary conditions defining the scope of permitted autonomy must be explicitly documented and agreed upon by all relevant stakeholders. This includes specifying what decisions the pilot may make independently, what requires human confirmation, and what constitutes an out-of-bounds action requiring immediate halt.
open_items.title: Confirm and document pilot capability boundary conditions

recovered_action_object.response: Autonomy pilot seeded. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved: confirming that the pilot's baseline capability boundary conditions are documented and agreed upon before any autonomous action is taken. A single wake has been scheduled to resolve this item using the specified recall target.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve open item pilot-baseline-boundary-001 by reviewing recalled boundary condition records and confirming or drafting the pilot capability boundary documentation.
